form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. At the latest run won by a 0.0 len at this track March 21 over 1000m defeating Enchantment with 57kg at $6.70. The run before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 0.7 len at this track February 18 over 1000m in the wet defeating Cool As Bling carrying 57kg at $6.30. Tough to beat on latest and can measure up again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lay out in the run home making contact with Enchantment passing the 350m.

form.formComment: Raced twice to date. When well in the market at debut, sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 7 at Wingatui on February 28 over 1100m, on a slow track; 2 len behind Final Time with 57kg at $1.90. Last start 3rd of 7 at this track on March 21 over 1000m, 1.3 len behind Hezzarocstar with 54kg at $4. Has been racing well. Big chance.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start 6th of 8 at this track on November 12 over 1000m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind I Am Belle carrying 55kg at $11.70. Went for a spell before returning settled well back; won by 2 len at Wingatui February 28 over 1100m on a soft track defeating Outback Girl with 55kg at $9.40. In form and expected to measure up again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inclined to lay inwards under pressure through the run home.

form.formComment: Resuming after a four months break. Finished off last preparation second last of 7 at Trentham in the G2 Wkfld Challenge December 20 over 1100m, soft track; 11 len behind Lara Antipova with 55kg at $9. On debut won by head this track November 12 over 1000m slow track defeating Zaharias with 55kg at $5.30. Worth following up.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Last outing held ground to the line 2nd of 7 at this track on March 21 over 1000m, 0.0 len behind Hezzarocstar carrying 54kg at $6.60. form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up rolled along in front before being edged out 2nd of 7 at Wingatui on February 28 over 1100m, on a slow track; 2 len behind Final Time carrying 53kg at $6.20. Second-up did the work up front then tired second last of 7 at this track on March 21 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Hezzarocstar carrying 54kg at $5.70. Sure to be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Was well in the market at debut, ran last of 9 at Riverton on April 4 over 1100m, slow going 16 len behind Ace App carrying 55kg at $4.60. Hard to have in this tough line-up.

form.formComment: First-starter by Turn Me Loose out of La Casona. Not seen on the track yet so hard to assess. Market the best guide to her chances.
